summary: Frontend testing completed for 'The Becoming' landing page. All requested feature changes tested and verified working correctly. Form validation, timing options, accommodation images, high-res form images, success page, and title changes all pass.

passed: WHO IS THIS FOR? section title correctly shows 'Who Is This For?' (not old 'Whom is The Becoming For?')
Form validation - Name field: Shows error 'This field is required to continue.' when empty
Form validation - Single-select: Shows error 'Please select an option to continue.' when nothing selected
Timing question options: April 2026, July 2026, Oct 2026, Flexible - all present and correct
Accommodation section: 4 images with correct labels (Mountain Sunrise, Monsoon Valley, Beach & Open Sky, Starry Night)
No duplicate 'friends sitting' image (photo-1529156069898) - appears only once in About section
Form step images use high resolution (w=1920&q=90) - verified in code
Success page includes Logo component and celebratory message 'You're on Your Way!'
Success page has checkmark icon, motivational quote, and 'Return Home' button

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested feature changes verified working. Form has 11 steps. Timing options at step 8. Accommodation images use different unsplash photos for mountain, valley, beach, and night sky. Form validation errors display in red text with data-testid='field-error'. The questionnaire modal has animations that may require longer waits (1500-2000ms) between steps due to Framer Motion.
